name: The Abyss Dragon Swordsoul
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>深</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>淵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>相</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned by a Wyrm monster's effect. If a monster is banished by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from the GY (if it was there when the monster was banished) or hand (even if not), but banish it when it leaves the field. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 card in the Field Zone and 1 monster your opponent controls or in their GY; banish them. You can only use each effect of "The Abyss Dragon Swordsoul" once per turn.

You can only use each effect of "The Abyss Dragon Swordsoul" once per turn.

eff_types: Summoning condition, Summoning condition, Trigger, Trigger, Condition
action: Activates if other cards are banished
summoning: Must be Special Summoned by a specific card effect
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
